Invasive species in the plots were controlled by aboveground biomass clipping

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:6f9f833f6b25
edges.original_sentence: In the spring of 2006, E. americanum and P. peltatum were planted at a density of 6 plants m-2, and C. thalictroides was transplanted into the plots at a density of 2 plants m-2. In the spring of 2007, second season survivorship was measured by counting the number of plants which returned to the plots. Erythronium americanum returned at a rate of 92%, P. peltatum at a rate of 97% and C. thalictroides at a rate of 100%.

source_spans.text: In the spring of 2006, E. americanum and P. peltatum were planted at a density of 6 plants m-2, and C. thalictroides was transplanted into the plots at a density of 2 plants m-2. In the spring of 2007, second season survivorship was measured by counting the number of plants which returned to the plots. Erythronium americanum returned at a rate of 92%, P. peltatum at a rate of 97% and C. thalictroides at a rate of 100%.

source_document.title: Upland Hardwood Forest Restoration: Testing Combinations of Vegetation in the Progress of Early Restoration

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:2a15de1b59c5
edges.original_sentence: Invasive species in the plots were controlled by aboveground biomass clipping during the same period. A decrease in the biomass of exotic species encountered was observed as the 2006 growing season neared an end.

source_spans.text: Invasive species in the plots were controlled by aboveground biomass clipping during the same period. A decrease in the biomass of exotic species encountered was observed as the 2006 growing season neared an end.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:65e78f20614e
edges.original_sentence: These included asexual plants returning as sexual plants, bearing flowers and producing fruit (P. peltatum and C. thalictroides), and returning transplants spawning extra clonal individuals within the plots (P. peltatum).
